title: keeper-enterprise.v1 (scaffold)
description: Scaffold-only schema for the keeper-enterprise family (P11 in docs/V2_DECISIONS.md). No body yet — landing as part of P11 work. Validators MUST reject any manifest that declares this schema with a non-empty body until x-keeper-live-proof.status leaves 'scaffold-only'.

x-keeper-live-proof.notes: Top-level keys planned: nodes, users, roles, teams, enforcements, aliases. See docs/V2_DECISIONS.md Q1.
